title: Stock Radar: Bank of Maharashtra breaks out from multi-year swing high on monthly charts; time to buy?
summary: Bank of Maharashtra has broken out from a multi-year swing high, trading above it since May. Experts suggest short-term traders can target Rs 86 in the coming weeks, citing the stock's resilience and positive technical indicators across multiple timeframes. A closing stop loss at Rs 76 is recommended.

title: Gold Steadies After Israel and Iran Agree to End Missile Strikes
summary: Gold was steady, after Israel and Iran agreed to end attacks that had jeopardized talks to end the war in the Middle East.

title: Greenpanel down but not out: why haven't analysts given up on MDF manufacturer?
summary: Greenpanel Industries has underperformed its MDF peers in 2026, weighed down by low capacity utilisation and margin compression, but 13 of 17 brokerages retain a 'buy' rating on the stock.&nbsp;

title: Alibaba, Baidu and BYD are now US-designated military companies in a blacklist – What does this mean?
summary: Pentagon has designated Alibaba, Baidu and BYD as Chinese military companies in a blacklist now covering 188 firms, up from roughly 130 last year.
